'''Gantho''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Gantho system/Legends|Gantho system]]. The planet was represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Arastide]]. In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was in the middle of an investigation into [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] and their supposed depletion of the world's resources.
